rationale.fidelity: Correctly rejects observed-type and type-specific thresholds, then restores one common score threshold with latent account type and the stated net-value objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Provides a complete actor-to-counterfactual decision structure and clearly explains the false-rejection versus malicious-admission mechanism.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is required; the response appropriately says novelty is not established.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels conditional score distributions as assumptions and identifies calibration, payoff, and stability validation needs.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and structured, with some repetitive gate and mapping language beyond what the diagnosis requires.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful repair of the hidden-information error with strong evidentiary boundaries.
